summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of a superb partial set featuring a monster Truckin’, an epic 17‑minute The Other One, and a standout Big Railroad Blues.
review: The recording delivers near‑perfect, crystal‑clear audio with only occasional pops, making the partial show a joy to hear. Musically the band is in top form – a soaring Truckin' leads into a marathon 17‑minute The Other One that rolls smoothly into Wharf Rat, and the Big Railroad Blues shines as a rare highlight from this era. Even though the second set ends abruptly, the performance feels like a machine running on all cylinders.

ai_rating.rationale: All reviews are 4–5 stars and praise both the superb musical moments (Truckin', The Other One, Big Railroad Blues) and the high‑fidelity soundboard quality, with only minor glitches noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Near‑perfect, crystal‑clear sound; a few minor pops/glitches mentioned, and the second set is truncated at its peak.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong partial set with a machine‑like tightness; the band clicks on all cylinders, delivering a warm‑up to Europe ’72 that builds beautifully despite the abrupt cut at the end of the second set.
